error.signature: CMake Error: CXX_STANDARD is set to invalid value '20' — compiler does not support C++20

verdict.summary: The CXX_STANDARD value (e.g., 20, 23) exceeds what the installed compiler version supports.

dead_ends.action: Set CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED to OFF to ignore the error
dead_ends.why_fails: Silently falls back to an older standard; code using C++20 features will fail with cryptic template errors.
Bypasses CMake's compiler feature detection; causes duplicate or conflicting flags.

workarounds.action: Upgrade the compiler to a version supporting the required standard
workarounds.how: sudo apt install g++-12  # g++-12 supports C++20; g++-13+ for C++23

workarounds.action: Lower CXX_STANDARD if the code does not actually use newer features
workarounds.how: set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)  # only if no C++20 features are used
